rationale: Add variability to enable uncovered generation, prompt, zipfile, VCS, and hook paths

updates.replacement:
extra_context_object
    : '{}'
    | '{' "project_name" ':' STRING_LITERAL '}'
    | '{' "use_docker" ':' STRING_LITERAL '}'
    | '{' "license" ':' LIST_LITERAL '}'
    | '{' "repo_name" ':' STRING_LITERAL ',' "project_name" ':' STRING_LITERAL '}'
    ;

STRING_LITERAL
    : '"Overwritten Project"'
    | '"true"'
    | '"false"'
    | '"custom_repo"'
    ;

LIST_LITERAL
    : '[' STRING_LITERAL (',' STRING_LITERAL)* ']'
    ;

invocation_object
    : '{'
      '"no_input"' ':' 'true' ','
      '"extra_context"' ':' extra_context_object ','
      '"replay"' ':' 'null' ','
      '"overwrite_if_exists"' ':' json_bool ','
      '"skip_if_file_exists"' ':' json_bool ','
      '"accept_hooks"' ':' json_bool ','
      '"keep_project_on_failure"' ':' json_bool ','
      '"output_dir_state"' ':' output_dir_state
      '}'
    | '{'
      '"no_input"' ':' 'false' ','
      '"extra_context"' ':' extra_context_object ','
      '"replay"' ':' replay_value ','
      '"overwrite_if_exists"' ':' json_bool ','
      '"skip_if_file_exists"' ':' json_bool ','
      '"accept_hooks"' ':' json_bool ','
      '"keep_project_on_failure"' ':' json_bool ','
      '"output_dir_state"' ':' output_dir_state ','
      '"_in_dict_var"' ':' json_bool
      '}'
    ;

prompts_object
    : '{}'
    | '{'
      '"project_name"' ':' '"Project name?"' ','
      '"use_docker"' ':' '"Use Docker?"' ','
      '"license"' ':' '"Choose a license"' ','
      '"database"' ':' '"Database settings"'
      '}'
    | '{'
      '"project_name"' ':' '"Name of the generated package"' ','
      '"owner"' ':' '"Owner metadata"' ','
      '"use_docker"' ':' '{' '"type"' ':' '"bool"' '}'
      '}'
    ;

hook_script
    : 'null'
    | '"from pathlib import Path\\nPath(\'HOOK_OK\').write_text(\'ok\', encoding=\'utf-8\')\\n"'
    | '"raise SystemExit(1)\\n"'
    | '"print(\'hook succeeded\')\\n"'
    ;
